title: Fix variable initialization is treated as time-varying

features.name: declaration-time initialization with input signal dependency
features.description: Code should include a variable initialized at declaration with an expression that depends on an input port

features.name: non-blocking assignment using declaration-initialized variable
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment that reads a variable which was initialized at declaration time

features.name: async reset in always_ff procedural block
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with asynchronous reset that uses a declaration-initialized variable
features.snippet:
always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        reg_a <= 0;
    end else begin
        reg_a <= data_in;
    end
end
